title: Queens Campus point cloud in Height color mode
capture_instructions: Height selected in Color Mode section. Same camera angle as the RGB screenshot (02-rgb-mode.png) for easy comparison. The elevation gradient should be clearly visible — ground level in blue/cyan, building mid-floors in green/yellow, rooftops and tree tops in orange/red.
ui_state: Settings tab, Color Mode = Height, Queens Campus loaded, same viewport angle as RGB screenshot
